llm_analysis.assessment: The changes align with the change request by removing the WhyChooseUsSection, adding stats to the Hero section, updating the CTA link, and modifying translations.

risks: app/page.tsx:Home - Potential rendering issues due to removal of WhyChooseUsSection.
components/hero-section.tsx:HeroSection - Incorrect display of stats or layout issues.
lib/translations.ts:translations - Incorrect or missing translations for stats.

llm_analysis.notes: The changes primarily involve rendering and translations, which do not directly handle input.
No API or contract changes detected.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Add tests to verify the correct rendering of the stats strip and updated translations.
